CVE-2013-4885.title: The http-domino-enum-passwords.nse script in NMap before 6.40, wh ...
CVE-2013-4885.description: The http-domino-enum-passwords.nse script in NMap before 6.40, when domino-enum-passwords.idpath is set, allows remote servers to upload "arbitrarily named" files via a crafted FullName parameter in a response, as demonstrated using directory traversal sequences.
